_comment: Save as .vscode/mcp.json in your project (or add via 'MCP: Add Server'). Replace /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO with where you cloned review-buddy. REVIEW_BUDDY_CWD uses the ${workspaceFolder} variable so the server knows the repo even if the agent forgets to pass cwd. --standalone = detached: submit_review returns the URL immediately (Copilot's MCP tool timeout is not configurable).
